repos.name: massgen/MassGen
repos.description: 🚀 MassGen is an open-source multi-agent scaling system that runs in your terminal, autonomously orchestrating frontier models and agents to collaborate, reason, and produce high-quality results. | Join us on Discord: discord.massgen.ai

repos.name: ImKKingshuk/LockKnife
repos.description: LockKnife: The Ultimate Android Security Research Tool. A unified TUI workspace and headless CLI for deep Android security research, built for researchers and hackers. Powered by Python orchestration and a Rust-accelerated core, enabling AI agent–driven hacking, credential recovery/cracking, APK analysis, intelligence gathering, runtime inspection.

repos.name: MLT-OSS/open-assistant-api
repos.description: The Open Assistant API is a ready-to-use, open-source, self-hosted agent/gpts orchestration creation framework, supporting customized extensions for LLM, RAG, function call, and tools capabilities. It also supports seamless integration with the openai/langchain sdk.

repos.name: EpicStaff/EpicStaff
repos.description: Open-source platform for building AI agents with a visual UI and modular backend.

repos.name: StreetLamb/rojak
repos.description: Python library for building durable and scalable multi-agent orchestrations.

repos.name: stimm-ai/stimm
repos.description: The Open Source Voice Agent Platform. Orchestrate ultra-low latency AI pipelines for real-time conversations over WebRTC.

repos.name: ItMeDiaTech/rag-cli
repos.description: Local Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) plugin for Claude Code that combines Chroma db vector embeddings with intelligent info retrieval with Multi-Agent Framework (MAF) orchestration for context-aware development assistance. Uses Open Source / Free frameworks. Implements bridge to Claude Code CLI so no token use. And it's easy to setup.

repos.name: kivo360/OmoiOS
repos.description: Spec-driven multi-agent orchestration — autonomous development workforce powered by Claude & OpenHands

repos.name: D0NMEGA/MoltGrid
repos.description: Open-source infrastructure for autonomous AI agents. Memory, messaging, task queues, and marketplace in one API.

repos.name: SutraLabs/sutra
repos.description: SutraAI is a lightweight, open-source framework for orchestrating AI agent pipelines. Designed for developers who want control, hackability, and offline execution, SutraAI lets you sequence small-to-mid-sized language models (2B–7B) with a simple, Python-based workflow. Think of it as the anti-bloat alternative to heavy frameworks like LangChain

repos.name: alparn/agentxsuite
repos.description: AgentxSuite is an open-source platform to connect, manage, and monitor AI Agents and Tools across multiple MCP servers — in one unified interface.

repos.name: JustMeStudio/OpenLOA
repos.description: The League of Agents (OpenLOA): An extensible orchestration framework for creating personalized AI agents with modular tools and custom interfaces. (智能体联盟 (OpenLOA)：一个可扩展的编排框架，用于通过模块化工具和自定义界面创建个性化 AI 智能体。)

repos.name: xhwSkhizein/agiwo
repos.description: Open-source streaming-first Python AI agent framework and console for building, orchestrating, tracing, and operating tool-using LLM agents.

repos.name: openairlabs/flyweel-agentic-seo-aeo-engine
repos.description: An open-source, lean AI content generator producing SEO-optimized blog posts via multi-model orchestration. Interactive CLI tool with Rich prompts, GSC-driven SEO optimization, and direct publishing capabilities.  Originally built by Flyweel  We're building the layer connecting spend, revenue, and capital with agentic finance.

repos.name: SanmTex/Conversion-of-Eclipse-to-OPM-Black-Oil-Simulation-by-Agentic-AI-Orchestration
repos.description: Seven autonomous Python agents that convert, validate, and forward-predict a legacy Eclipse reservoir simulation using OPM Flow (open-source, CPU-only).

repos.name: EvezArt/evez-agentnet
repos.description: Open-source multi-agent income loop — OODA orchestrator, AgentMemory, MetaLearner. Autonomous agent coordination for EVEZ ecosystem.

repos.name: BDHU/thinkagain
repos.description: A minimal RAG/agent orchestration framework

repos.name: venerass/duelyst-ai-core
repos.description: Duelyst.ai is a platform where AI models debate topics in structured multi-turn exchanges. This is the open-source debate engine — a standalone Python package published on PyPI (pip install duelyst-ai-core). It contains the LangGraph-based orchestration of multi-agent debates, model adapters, tool integrations, and a CLI.

repos.name: herakles-dev/nova-forge
repos.description: Open-source agent orchestration framework. V11's proven patterns, any LLM, pure Python.

repos.name: irfanalidv/AgentEnsemble
repos.description: AgentEnsemble is a Production-ready multi-agent orchestration for Python. ReAct, Swarm, Pipeline, Debate, Router, Planner, WorkflowGraph. Observability, cost tracking, human-in-loop. Structured outputs via Pydantic + LangChain.

repos.name: raduandreibulai/prd-agents
repos.description: Open-source multi-agent system that transforms meeting transcripts into structured execution artifacts (PRD, Jira plan, ROI model).

repos.name: ashlrai/ashlr-ao
repos.description: Local-first AI agent orchestration platform. Manage Claude Code, Codex, Aider, and Goose from one command center.

repos.name: cogniolab/hybrid-agent-framework
repos.description: Open-source framework combining OpenAI + Claude Agent SDKs. Intelligent routing, hybrid   workflows, and production-ready automation. Bring your own API keys.

repos.name: sujitpatange/Multiagent
repos.description: Python projects showcasing multi-agent orchestration with Antigravity, using open-source Ollama models. Includes vibe-coding workflows, reusable components, and examples for building, coordinating, and experimenting with autonomous agents locally.

repos.name: mbwika/Janda_AI-Job-Application-Agent
repos.description: Janda is a sophisticated, autonomous AI job search and application assistant — a highly practical use case that merges multi-agent orchestration, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines, LLM reasoning, resume/CV comparison, and web scraping/search APIs built using open-source and free tools.
